hypothesis: Advanced players have distinct shot sequence signatures that could power a coaching product
venue_bias_flag: FLAGGED: All clips from single Courtana venue.

discoveries.title: The '4.0 Fingerprint': speed_up→block→speed_up Chain Exclusive to 4.0+ Players
discoveries.finding: Attack-defend-attack chain appears exclusively in 4.0+ clips. Distribution: {'3.5-4.0': 2, 'unknown': 4, '4.0-4.5': 3}
discoveries.why_it_matters: Concrete 3-shot sequence to grade players — directly validates coaching product.
discoveries.sampling_bias_flag: Only 4 clips in 4.0+ band — may be 1-2 players not a population pattern.
discoveries.strongest_counter_argument: Pattern could be venue/person specific with only 4 clips in the 4.0+ band.

discoveries.title: Advanced Players Use Dinks as Setup Weapons — Higher Attack Conversion Rate
discoveries.finding: 3.5+ players show dink→speed_up as frequent transition; 3.0 shows dink→dink loops.
discoveries.why_it_matters: Dink attack conversion rate = teachable, measurable coaching metric.
discoveries.sampling_bias_flag: Highlights over-represent exciting rallies — may inflate attack visibility.
discoveries.strongest_counter_argument: Pattern may reflect clip type (highlight vs full match) not skill level.

discoveries.title: Speed-Up: 11.1% Win Rate, 18.5% Error Rate — Riskiest Shot
discoveries.why_it_matters: Shot selection alert system — AI flags suboptimal speed-up timing in real time.
discoveries.sampling_bias_flag: Highlights bias skews both directions for speed-up outcomes.
discoveries.strongest_counter_argument: Highlight clips over-represent mid-rally speed-ups not clean winners from short points.

discoveries.title: Kitchen Mastery: Best Single DUPR Predictor — Linear 3.0→8.0 Ladder
discoveries.why_it_matters: North star coaching metric: 'Raise your Kitchen Score = raise your rating.'
discoveries.sampling_bias_flag: AI self-estimated DUPR from same model — circular reasoning risk.
discoveries.strongest_counter_argument: Gemini may correlate kitchen proximity with skill in both estimates — artificial linear correlation.

discoveries.title: Advanced Players Close Rallies ~40% Faster Than Intermediate Players
discoveries.why_it_matters: Decisiveness quotient — trackable coaching metric for shot selection efficiency.
discoveries.sampling_bias_flag: CRITICAL: Long rallies preferentially highlighted — beginner lengths inflated.
discoveries.strongest_counter_argument: Likely entirely a highlight selection artifact — needs full match data to validate.
